recipes.name: 40%-off roast chicken & root veg
recipes.desc: Steggles whole bird on special. Lemon & thyme in the cavity, no allium stuffing.
recipes.waste: Carcass → onion-free stock; leftover meat → lunches; potato bag shared 3 meals
recipe: Oven 190°C. Lemon + thyme in the cavity, oil + salt the skin.
Roast ~1.7kg bird 75–80 min over potatoes + carrots, baste twice.
Rest 15 min under foil. Pan juices + cornflour = GF gravy.

recipes.name: Lamb forequarter chops, warm potato & cherry tom salad
recipes.desc: Coles forequarter chops $6/kg off. Lemon, dried oregano, garlic-infused oil — Greek without the alliums.
recipes.waste: Potatoes from shared bag; oregano is dry pantry spice
recipe: Marinate ~700g chops: lemon juice, dried oregano, garlic-infused oil, 20 min.
Grill or hot pan ~4 min a side (forequarter likes medium); rest 5.
Boil potatoes, halve warm, toss with oil, lemon, cherry toms + qukes.

recipes.name: Salmon, broccolini & smashed potatoes
recipes.desc: Tassie salmon skin-on $4/kg off at Coles. Broccolini $2.30 a bunch.
recipes.waste: Potatoes from shared bag; broccolini stems → stir-fry
recipe: Boil potatoes 12 min, smash, crisp in olive oil.
Pan-sear 2 salmon portions (~400g) skin-down 4 min, flip 2 min.
Char broccolini in same pan, splash soy + lemon.

recipes.name: Prawn & ginger stir-fry on rice
recipes.desc: Karumba raw banana prawns Down Down $19/kg. Ginger, broccolini stems, FODMAP-safe soy.
recipes.waste: Uses broccolini stems + spring-onion greens from other meals
recipe: Peel 400g prawns; pat dry. Rice on.
Wok on high: ginger + broccolini stems 1 min in garlic-infused oil.
Prawns 90 sec, soy + rice vinegar + white pepper, spring-onion greens off heat.

recipes.name: Slow-braised oyster blade & mash
recipes.desc: Coles oyster blade $3 off — the right cut for a winter braise. Woolies diced tomatoes $1.10/can.
recipes.waste: Uses carrot-bag remainder; both tomato cans fully used; freezes well
recipe: Brown 500g oyster blade chunks hard in batches; set aside.
Carrots + 2 cans diced tomatoes + 1 cup water + rosemary + balsamic; beef back in.
Lid on, 160°C oven 2.5 hrs. Mash potatoes with olive oil.

recipes.name: Pork sirloin, air-fryer chips & rocket
recipes.desc: Coles pork sirloin $2.50 off and McCain air-fryer chips half price — pub dinner at home.
recipes.waste: Chips live in freezer; rocket remainder → lunches
recipe: Chips into air fryer per pack (~18 min).
Pork steaks: salt, hot pan 3–4 min a side, rest 5 under foil.
Rocket + lemon + olive oil + parmesan if you have it.

recipes.name: Thai red curry prawns & jasmine rice
recipes.desc: Prawns on special. Thai curry paste (no garlic/onion added), coconut milk, bok choy — 20 min.
recipes.waste: Curry paste jar lasts weeks; coconut milk fully used; bok choy shared with stir-fries
recipe: Heat 2 tbsp curry paste in wok with garlic-infused oil 1 min.
400mL coconut milk + 300g prawns + bok choy, simmer 8 min.
Lime juice, white pepper, Thai basil if available. Rice on the side.

recipes.name: Laksa with rice noodles & poached eggs
recipes.desc: Laksa paste + coconut milk broth, prawns or chicken, rice noodles. Adapted for low FODMAP (no shallots).
recipes.waste: Paste jar lasts; coconut milk fully used; eggs double as breakfasts
recipe: Boil rice noodles per pack; drain.
Heat 3 tbsp laksa paste in garlic-infused oil 1 min, add 400mL coconut milk + 300mL stock.
Simmer 8 min with 300g prawns + bok choy; poach 2 eggs in the broth; garnish with coriander.

recipes.name: Chicken & basil stir-fry noodles
recipes.desc: Thai-style basil chicken mince, fresh Thai basil, rice noodles, bok choy. Spring-onion greens only.
recipes.waste: Whole basil bunch used; spring-onion greens from earlier meals
recipe: Boil rice noodles per pack.
Brown 400g chicken mince hard in garlic-infused oil; add soy, white pepper, 1 tsp maple.
Toss noodles + bok choy; big handful Thai basil off heat, spring-onion greens over.

recipes.name: Orange & chilli chicken stir-fry with rice
recipes.desc: Chicken on special. Orange zest & juice (actual citrus, not bottled — low FODMAP). Bok choy, ginger.
recipes.waste: Orange shared with duck night; ginger keeps weeks
recipe: Slice 450g chicken breast thin; toss with 1 tsp cornflour.
Wok on high: sear chicken in batches, set aside; ginger + bok choy 1 min.
Orange juice + zest + soy + 1 tsp maple; chicken back in, whole chilli pepper if you like.

recipes.name: Peanut satay chicken & rice (FODMAP-safe)
recipes.desc: Chicken thighs on special. Peanut butter sauce with garlic-infused oil, lemongrass (optional), rice.
recipes.waste: Peanut butter is pantry; lemongrass keeps weeks dried
recipe: Marinate 450g thigh fillets: soy + garlic-infused oil + 1 tsp maple, 15 min.
Pan-fry 5 min a side; set aside.
Sauce: peanut butter + coconut milk + lime + soy, thin with water; simmer thighs in it, 5 min.

recipes.name: Miso-glazed salmon & bok choy
recipes.desc: Salmon on special. White miso glaze (low sodium, no added garlic), sesame oil, lime.
recipes.waste: Miso paste jar lasts months; sesame oil lasts months
recipe: Glaze: 2 tbsp white miso + 1 tbsp maple + lime juice + 1 tsp sesame oil.
Brush over 2 salmon portions (~400g); bake 200°C 12–14 min.
Bok choy steamed alongside, drizzle sesame oil + soy.

recipes.name: Tom yum chicken soup & jasmine rice
recipes.desc: Tom yum paste, chicken, prawns optional, ginger, lime, bok choy. Adapted: no onion/garlic added.
recipes.waste: Paste jar lasts; ginger shared with stir-fries
recipe: Heat 2 tbsp tom yum paste in garlic-infused oil 1 min; add 600mL stock + 200mL coconut milk.
Simmer with 300g chicken cubes + bok choy 12 min; add lime juice, white pepper.
Jasmine rice on the side; coriander if you have it.

recipes.name: Tandoori chicken, cucumber yoghurt & rice
recipes.desc: Chicken on special. Tandoori paste (check label for garlic — many are garlic-free), LF yoghurt, cucumber.
recipes.waste: Tandoori paste jar lasts; yoghurt shared with breakfasts
recipe: Marinate 450g chicken breast: 3 tbsp tandoori paste + 2 tbsp LF yoghurt, 20 min.
Bake 200°C 16 min, turning once; rest 5.
Cucumber salad: smashed, salt 10 min, dress with LF yoghurt + lime.

recipes.name: Massaman beef curry & jasmine rice
recipes.desc: Beef on special (rump or chuck). Massaman paste, potato, carrot, tamarind, peanut butter.
recipes.waste: Paste lasts; potatoes from shared bag; peanut butter is pantry
recipe: Brown 400g beef cubes; set aside.
Fry 3 tbsp massaman paste in garlic-infused oil 2 min; add 400mL coconut milk + 300mL stock.
Beef + potatoes + carrot (shared bag), simmer 45 min; finish with peanut butter + tamarind + lime.

recipes.name: Coconut chicken curry with bok choy
recipes.desc: Chicken on special. Light curry (turmeric, coriander, cumin), coconut milk, ginger, lime.
recipes.waste: Spices are pantry; coconut milk fully used; bok choy shared
recipe: Heat garlic-infused oil + 1 tsp turmeric + 1 tsp coriander + 1 tsp cumin + ginger, 1 min.
Add 400mL coconut milk + 300g chicken cubes, simmer 15 min.
Bok choy in for last 5 min; finish with lime juice, white pepper.

recipes.name: Peking duck legs with orange & potatoes
recipes.desc: Luv-a-Duck Peking legs on special — pre-cooked. WA navel oranges $3.50/kg.
recipes.waste: Legs are a sealed two-serve pack; orange zest + juice both used
recipe: Duck legs per pack, 200°C ~25 min until skin crisps.
Pan sauce: juice + zest of 1 orange, splash soy, 1 tsp maple, reduce.
Roast potatoes from shared bag alongside; orange segments in a leafy salad.

recipes.name: Salt & pepper squid, chips & qukes
recipes.desc: KB's S&P squid half price. Air-fryer chips + smashed cucumber = casual Friday fakeaway.
recipes.waste: Uses qukes pack half + open chips bag from pork night
recipe: Squid + chips per pack timing (air fryer ~15 min).
Qukes: smash, salt 10 min, rice vinegar + sesame oil.
Lemon over everything. Check crumb ingredients if strict FODMAP this week.

recipes.name: Tuna, cherry tomato & olive pasta (GF option)
recipes.desc: Sirena on special. Woolies home-brand pasta $1, cherry toms. GF pasta keeps it low FODMAP.
recipes.fod: Low FODMAP w/ GF pasta · LF
recipes.waste: Olives finish in lunches; tuna oil becomes sauce base
recipe: Pasta on (GF if keeping strict).
Cherry toms blistered in tuna's olive oil + garlic-infused oil + whole chilli if you like.
Tuna + olives + pasta water to emulsify; lemon zest over.

recipes.name: Bacon & egg fried rice
recipes.desc: D'Orsogna shortcut bacon 40% off. Use 250g here, rest to breakfasts/freezer. Day-old rice fries best.
recipes.waste: Bacon keeps 3+ weeks sealed (or freeze portions); uses spring-onion greens already bought
recipe: Cook rice ahead (or use stir-fry night's extra), spread to dry.
Crisp 250g diced bacon; push aside, scramble 4 eggs in the fat.
Rice on high heat, soy + white pepper, spring-onion greens off heat.

recipes.name: Drumstick traybake (cook half, freeze half)
recipes.desc: Coles 2kg drumstick pack $7 — $3.50/kg. Roast 1kg with WA sweet corn; freeze the rest.
recipes.waste: Half pack straight to freezer — labelled and dated
recipe: Oven 210°C. 1kg drumsticks: oil, smoked paprika, salt; 40 min, turning once.
Corn cobs in foil alongside, 25 min (keep to ½ cob each for FODMAP).
Freeze other 1kg drumsticks raw. Leafy salad on side.

recipes.name: Easy night: oven-bake fish & steam-fresh veg
recipes.desc: Both half-price-ish at Woolies. Fish $6 (half price), veg $3.60. Gold kiwis for dessert. Zero effort.
recipes.waste: Everything portioned — nothing left over
recipe: Fish fillets per pack, 200°C ~25 min.
Steam-fresh veg in microwave, olive oil + lemon.
Gold kiwis after — low FODMAP, unlike most fruit on special this week.

recipes.name: Beef fajita strips with bok choy & rice
recipes.desc: Beef strips on special. Capsicum, garlic-infused oil, lime, cumin — no traditional onion.
recipes.waste: Spices are pantry; bok choy shared with stir-fries
recipe: Slice 400g beef thin; toss with cumin + lime juice + 1 tbsp garlic-infused oil, 10 min.
High heat wok: beef 90 sec, remove; capsicum + bok choy 2 min.
Beef back in, soy + white pepper; lime over. Rice on the side.

recipes.name: Pork & apple ginger braise (apple OK low FODMAP)
recipes.desc: Pork on special. Granny Smith apples low FODMAP, ginger, apple cider vinegar — gentle braise.
recipes.waste: Apples fully used; ginger keeps weeks
recipe: Brown 450g pork shoulder chunks; set aside.
Apples (peeled, cored) + ginger slices + 1 cup stock + 2 tbsp cider vinegar; pork back in.
Lid on, 160°C oven 1.5 hrs. Mash potatoes on the side.

recipes.name: Tofu & peanut noodle bowls
recipes.desc: Firm tofu, rice noodles, FODMAP-safe peanut-lime sauce, cucumber & carrot.
recipes.waste: Peanut butter & soy pantry; whole tofu block used
recipe: Press + cube 400g tofu; crisp in hot oil, splash soy.
Sauce: peanut butter + lime + soy + maple + ginger, thin with water.
Soak rice noodles; toss everything, cucumber + carrot ribbons over.

recipes.name: Lemongrass chicken soup & jasmine rice
recipes.desc: Chicken on special. Lemongrass (dried is fine), ginger, lime, coconut milk — fragrant and low FODMAP.
recipes.waste: Lemongrass dried keeps months; ginger shared
recipe: Heat garlic-infused oil + 1 tbsp lemongrass paste (or dried) + ginger, 1 min.
Add 600mL stock + 200mL coconut milk, simmer 8 min with 300g chicken cubes.
Lime juice; coriander if available. Jasmine rice on side.

recipes.name: Korean beef bibimbap with rice
recipes.desc: Beef on special. Marinated in soy + sesame, served over rice with carrots, bok choy, egg — no traditional garlic/onion.
recipes.waste: Sesame oil lasts months; bok choy shared
recipe: Slice 400g beef thin; marinate: soy + 1 tsp sesame oil + 1 tsp maple + ginger, 20 min.
Rice on. Sear beef hard in a wok, 90 sec; set aside.
Stir-fry carrots + bok choy 2 min in garlic-infused oil; top rice. Beef on top, fried egg.
Drizzle with remaining marinade + sesame oil.

recipes.name: Vietnamese caramel chicken & rice
recipes.desc: Chicken thighs on special. Caramel sauce (sugar + soy + ginger) — no traditional aromatics, low FODMAP.
recipes.waste: Sugar & soy are pantry; ginger shared
recipe: Caramel: melt 2 tbsp sugar in a pan, add 3 tbsp soy + 1 tbsp garlic-infused oil + ginger.
Brown 450g chicken thigh chunks, pour caramel over, simmer 15 min, covered.
Finish with lime juice. Jasmine rice + steamed bok choy on side.

recipes.name: Japanese teriyaki salmon & steamed rice
recipes.desc: Salmon on special. Teriyaki glaze (soy + maple + ginger), served with steamed bok choy.
recipes.waste: Glaze ingredients all pantry staples
recipe: Glaze: 3 tbsp soy + 2 tbsp maple + 1 tsp ginger paste + 1 tsp garlic-infused oil.
Brush over 2 salmon portions (~400g); bake 200°C 12 min.
Steam bok choy alongside; drizzle extra glaze over rice.

recipes.name: Thai basil squid with jasmine rice
recipes.desc: Squid on special. Thai basil, ginger, lime — quick stir-fry.
recipes.waste: Whole basil bunch used; pantry soy
recipe: Slice 400g squid tubes into rings; pat dry.
High heat wok: garlic-infused oil + ginger 30 sec, squid 1.5 min (don't overcook).
Soy + lime juice + whole handful Thai basil off heat. Rice on side.

recipes.name: Green curry chicken & bok choy
recipes.desc: Chicken on special. Green curry paste (check label: many are garlic-free), coconut milk, bok choy.
recipes.waste: Paste jar lasts weeks; coconut milk fully used
recipe: Heat 3 tbsp green curry paste in garlic-infused oil 1 min.
Add 400mL coconut milk + 300g chicken cubes, simmer 12 min.
Bok choy in for last 3 min; finish with lime, white pepper.

recipes.name: Slow-cooker beef & root veg stew
recipes.desc: Beef on special. Set in morning, ready for dinner — carrots, potatoes, herbs, wine.
recipes.waste: Uses carrot & potato bag remainder; freezes well
recipe: Brown 600g beef cubes in batches; place in slow cooker.
Add carrots + potatoes (from shared bag) + 300mL red wine + 200mL stock + thyme.
Cook on low 6–8 hrs. Freeze any extra.

recipes.name: Fish tacos (lettuce wraps) with lime crema
recipes.desc: Fish on special. Crunchy lettuce wraps instead of tortillas — low carb, low FODMAP.
recipes.waste: LF mayo is fridge staple; lettuce fully used
recipe: Pan-fry 400g fish fillets (skin-on if available) 3 min a side; flake.
Crema: LF mayo + lime juice + white pepper.
Butter lettuce leaves as wraps; fill with fish, crema, shredded carrot, coriander.

recipes.name: Chicken & rice bowl with fried egg
recipes.desc: Rotisserie chicken (buy ready-made on special). Shred, serve over rice, top with fried egg + carrots.
recipes.waste: Uses bought roast chicken (minimal prep); carcass keeps for stock
recipe: Rice on. Shred 1 rotisserie chicken (from special) into warm rice.
Fry 2 eggs; top rice, season with soy + white pepper.
Steamed carrots on the side.

recipes.name: Braised pork belly with bok choy
recipes.desc: Pork belly on special. Ginger, soy, maple — low FODMAP Chinese-style braise.
recipes.waste: Soy & ginger are shared; bok choy from stir-fry supply
recipe: Brown 500g pork belly chunks; place in pot.
Add 400mL stock + 4 tbsp soy + 2 tbsp maple + ginger slices.
Simmer 45 min, covered. Bok choy in for last 5 min.

recipes.name: Quick ramen bowls with poached eggs
recipes.desc: Rice ramen noodles, simple miso broth, poached eggs, bok choy. 15 min.
recipes.waste: Miso paste lasts months; noodles are pantry
recipe: Boil 500mL stock + 2 tbsp white miso (whisked smooth); simmer 2 min.
Cook rice ramen per pack; divide into bowls.
Poach 2 eggs gently in broth; pour broth over noodles.
Steamed bok choy + sesame oil + spring-onion greens.

recipes.name: Butter chicken with rice (LF coconut cream)
recipes.desc: Chicken on special. Butter chicken adapted for low FODMAP (no traditional onion/garlic).
recipes.waste: Tomato paste tube shared; cream lasts
recipe: Brown 450g chicken cubes; set aside.
Heat garlic-infused oil + 2 tsp garam masala + 2 tbsp tomato paste, 1 min.
Add 200mL stock + 100mL LF cream + chicken, simmer 12 min.
Finish with lime juice, coriander. Rice on side.

recipes.name: Charred broccoli & beef with soy
recipes.desc: Beef strips on special. High-heat charred broccoli, simple soy glaze — 12 min.
recipes.waste: Soy & sesame oil pantry; broccoli fully used
recipe: Slice 400g beef thin; toss with 1 tbsp soy + 1 tsp sesame oil.
High heat wok: char beef 60 sec, remove; char broccoli 2 min.
Beef back in, 2 tbsp soy + 1 tsp sesame oil + white pepper; toss. Rice on side.

recipes.name: Red lentil dhal with coconut & rice
recipes.desc: Lentils are cheap + on pantry shelf. Coconut milk, ginger, turmeric — vegetarian, protein-rich.
recipes.waste: Lentils & spices are pantry staples
recipe: Sauté 1 tsp turmeric + 1 tsp cumin + ginger in garlic-infused oil, 1 min.
Add 150g red lentils + 400mL coconut milk + 300mL stock, simmer 18 min.
Finish with lime juice, coriander. Jasmine rice on side.

recipes.name: Honey soy chicken & crispy potatoes
recipes.desc: Chicken thighs on special. Honey soy glaze, roast with baby potatoes from the shared bag.
recipes.waste: Glaze pantry; potatoes from shared bag
recipe: Glaze: 3 tbsp soy + 2 tbsp honey + 1 tbsp garlic-infused oil + 1 tsp ginger.
Toss 450g chicken thighs + baby potatoes (from shared bag); roast 200°C 25 min.
Drizzle with glaze halfway through. Steam bok choy on side.

recipes.name: Prawn & egg fried rice with peas
recipes.desc: Prawns on special. Frozen peas are FODMAP-safe. Day-old rice is best.
recipes.waste: Peas are frozen (no waste); pantry soy
recipe: Cook rice ahead or use stir-fry night's leftover.
Scramble 2 eggs in garlic-infused oil; remove.
Stir-fry 300g prawns 90 sec; rice on high heat, soy + white pepper + frozen peas + eggs.

recipes.name: Baked white fish with herb butter & lemon
recipes.desc: Fish on special. Whole baked with fresh herbs, lemon, olive oil — minimal effort.
recipes.waste: Herbs dry well; fish simple + fast
recipe: Place 2 fish fillets on foil; top with lemon slices, fresh herbs (dill/thyme), olive oil, salt.
Bake 200°C 14 min. Steamed potatoes + leafy salad on side.

recipes.name: Quick chickpea curry with spinach
recipes.desc: Canned chickpeas + curry paste. Spinach, coconut milk — vegetarian, budget.
recipes.waste: Chickpeas canned (shelf); curry paste lasts
recipe: Heat 2 tbsp curry paste in garlic-infused oil 1 min.
Add 1 can chickpeas (drained) + 200mL coconut milk + 200mL stock, simmer 8 min.
Stir in 150g fresh spinach off heat; lime, coriander. Rice on side.

recipes.name: Pork chops in apple cider braise
recipes.desc: Pork chops on special. Granny Smith apples (low FODMAP), cider, thyme.
recipes.waste: Apples fully used; thyme dries
recipe: Brown 2 pork chops; set aside.
Deglaze with 200mL cider + 200mL stock; return chops.
Add apple chunks (peeled, cored) + thyme; braise 15 min. Mash potatoes on side.

recipes.name: Mussels in white wine & herbs (if on special)
recipes.desc: Mussels on special — expensive usually, but dramatic when discounted. Wine, lemon, fresh parsley.
recipes.waste: Wine shared; shells = natural disposal
recipe: Heat garlic-infused oil + fresh herbs (parsley, thyme); add 600g mussels.
Pour 250mL white wine + 100mL stock over; steam covered 5 min until open.
Discard any closed. Serve with crusty bread + rice.

recipes.name: Beef mince lettuce cups (Asian-style)
recipes.desc: Ground beef on special. Soy-ginger filling in butter lettuce leaves — no carbs, fun format.
recipes.waste: Lettuce fully used; all sauces pantry
recipe: Brown 400g ground beef; add ginger + soy + 1 tsp sesame oil.
Stir in finely diced water chestnuts (canned, drained) + spring-onion greens.
Serve in butter lettuce leaves; drizzle with sesame oil + soy.

recipes.name: Baked cod with cherry tomatoes & olives
recipes.desc: Cod on special. Mediterranean-ish (no traditional aromatics), simple 20-min bake.
recipes.waste: Cherry toms & olives shared with other nights
recipe: Place 2 cod fillets (~400g) on foil or parchment.
Top with cherry tomatoes + kalamata olives + capers + lemon slices + olive oil.
Bake 200°C 16 min. Steamed potatoes on side.

recipes.name: Chicken satay noodles (FODMAP-safe peanut)
recipes.desc: Chicken on special. Grilled skewers with peanut dipping sauce, rice noodles.
recipes.waste: Peanut butter pantry; noodles half-pack
recipe: Cube 400g chicken breast; thread onto skewers. Grill or pan 8 min, turning.
Sauce: peanut butter + coconut milk + lime + soy + ginger.
Rice noodles per pack; serve with sauce for dipping + cucumber salad.
